hero.subtitle: A refined journey through Japanese culinary artistry

storytelling.line1: Born from Tokyo's most guarded secrets
storytelling.line4: This is not dinner. This is devotion.

about.subtitle: The Artist Behind the Counter
about.title: Chef Takeshi
about.paragraph1: For over fifteen years, Chef Takeshi pursued the art of sushi across Tokyo's most revered kitchens. Trained under third-generation masters in Ginza, he learned that every grain of rice carries intention, and every cut tells a story that began long before it reached the plate.
about.paragraph2: Now in the heart of Saudi Arabia, he brings a lifetime of devotion to Sugi Sushi — where tradition meets the bold ambition of a new culinary frontier. Each evening is an act of precision, respect, and quiet rebellion against the ordinary.
about.philosophy: Every dish at Sugi Sushi is guided by three principles that Chef Takeshi has refined over decades of practice. These are not rules — they are a way of seeing food.
about.quote: The ocean gives us its best. My job is to listen, not to interfere.

reservations.subtitle: Secure Your Table
reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.name: Full Name
reservations.successMessage: We'll send a confirmation to your email shortly. We look forward to welcoming you to Sugi Sushi.

location.subtitle: Find Us
location.title: Visit Sugi Sushi
location.addressLine1: Prince Mohammed bin Abdulaziz St, Al Olaya District
location.note: Omakase seating is limited to 8 guests per evening. We recommend booking at least one week in advance. Walk-ins are welcome at the bar, subject to availability.

footer.note: Prices are inclusive of VAT. A 10% service charge applies.
footer.allergyNote: Please inform us of any allergies before ordering.
